name: Cadence
description: Rounded bars of random lengths laid out like sheet-music rhythm — on each redraw the whole score breathes to a new measure.

code.style: --bar: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --len: @rand(15%, 92%); --rule: ( :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 4%; top: 33%; height: 34%; width: var(--len); border-radius: 200px; background: var(--bar); opacity: 0; transition: ease 600ms; } @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { opacity: 1; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
